caption: The video begins with a scene inside a home where a woman with blonde, bobbed hair wears a blue v-neck shirt and a necklace. She is speaking and looking toward a young man with light brown hair who is wearing a grey t-shirt. On the table in front of them are a yellow mug and a glass of orange juice. The scene then abruptly cuts to an exterior shot of the White House in Washington, D.C. The large white building features classical columns, a balcony, and a fountain spraying water in the foreground. An American flag flies from a tall pole atop the building, and green trees and manicured hedges frame the structure under a bright, sunny sky. The remaining frames show this same exterior view of the White House, with the scene remaining static across the final segments.
